description: Triage classifier eval — REALISTIC. Natural speech patterns with filler words, false starts, and rambling as captured by real-time transcription.

cases.text: So um yeah the uh the deployment went out last night and uh it looks like the the login page is broken for users on Safari specifically. We got like twelve tickets about it this morning.
cases.note: Lots of filler words but contains a real bug report with specifics

cases.text: I was I was talking to um Janet and she she mentioned that the the client wants to push the deadline to to next Friday instead of Wednesday which honestly I think is is fine because we need the extra time anyway.
cases.note: Heavy stuttering/repetition from transcription but real scheduling change

cases.text: Okay so the thing the thing I wanted to bring up is um we're we're over budget by about thirty thousand on the on the marketing spend and we need to figure out where to cut.
cases.note: False starts but contains critical budget info

cases.text: You know what I was I was thinking about it over the weekend and I think we should just go with the the React Native approach instead of native because we we don't have enough iOS developers.
cases.note: Weekend reflection leading to a real technical decision

cases.text: So basically basically what happened was the the database the database migration script it didn't run the rollback properly and now we've got like duplicate records everywhere.
